info.name: American Latin Class API
info.description: Defense-ready manual verification collection for American Latin Class. It covers authentication, authorization, catalogs, academic enrollment, attendance, payments, events, reports, account governance and student self-service with executable Postman tests.

exec: pm.test('Skipped when google_id_token is empty', () => pm.expect([401, 422]).to.include(pm.response.code));
pm.test('Branded invitation contains a temporary credential', () => { pm.expect(invitation.Subject).to.eql('Tu acceso a American Latin Class'); pm.expect(match).to.exist; });

pm.test('Reset email sent without exposing password', () => { const data = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(data.user.mustChangePassword).to.be.true; pm.expect(data.invitation.status).to.eql('sent'); pm.expect(data.temporaryPassword).to.be.undefined; });

pm.test('Invitation resent without exposing password', () => { const data = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(data.invitation.status).to.eql('sent'); pm.expect(data.temporaryPassword).to.be.undefined; });
pm.environment.set('roster_records', JSON.stringify(roster.map((row) => ({ studentId: row.student.id, status: 'present', notes: 'Postman batch draft' }))));

item.name: Teacher Check In - Duplicate Open Record
Reject Enrollment Deletion With Attendance History

exec: pm.test('HTTP 404 when no file was uploaded', () => pm.response.to.have.status(404));

body.raw:
{
  "branchId": "{{branch_id}}",
  "title": "Postman Dance Showcase",
  "description": "Event created during defense verification.",
  "level": "ALL",
  "startsAt": "{{event_start}}",
  "endsAt": "{{event_end}}",
  "location": "American Latin Class",
  "showIncome": 250,
  "active": true
}

exec: pm.test('Attendance dimensions returned', () => { const data = pm.response.json().data; pm.expect(data.byStudent).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(data.byClassGroup).to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(data.byBranch).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Set student_login_email and student_login_password in the environment before running this folder.
